opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I rolled my ankle stepping off the curb, and it's throbbing right on the outside bone.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I twisted my ankle 2 hours ago and I'm worried it might be broken.

symptom_narrative.onset: 2 hours ago, rolled the ankle inward stepping off a curb
symptom_narrative.character: mild throbbing over the outer ankle
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: mild pain, worse turning the ankle in
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no pop or snap, no locking, no numbness; I could still walk on it home

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a two-storey home with handrails on the stairs

objective_data_offered.value: able to bear weight and take 4+ steps at the time of injury and now, with a limp
minimal swelling, no bruising, tender over the outer ankle ligaments on video/self-palpation
no tenderness when pressing the back edge/tip of the ankle bones, the base of the little-toe bone, or the midfoot bone
